word: G3081 - λυσιτελεῖ - lysiteleî - loo-sit-el-i' - It is better

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: It is better
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Third person singular present indicative active of a derivative of a compound of G3080 and G5056; impersonally it answers the purpose, that is, is advantageous: - it is better.
